nasb.text: but I discipline my body and make it my slave, so that, after I have preached to others, I myself will not be disqualified.

esv.text: But I discipline my body and keep it under control, lest after preaching to others I myself should be disqualified.

cnv.text: 我要克制自己的身體，叫身體服我，免得我傳了給別人，自己反而落選了。

ccb.text: 我严格训练自己，克服自身的软弱，免得我传福音给别人，自己却被淘汰了。

csbs.text: 然而我不断克制自己的身体，使它服从我，免得我传道给别人，自己反而经不起考验了。
